APPEARANCES - ATTY. JORDAN M. OTIS OF MOSCONE EMBLIDGE & OTIS LLP, TEL. NO. 1-415-362-3599 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. MYTHILY SIVARAJAH OF THE ADAMS NYE BECHT LLP, TEL. NO. 1-415-982-8955 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT LINZEWR PRODUCTS CORPORATION BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF LAURENCE VINOCUR's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And [Proposed] Consent Judgment As To Linzer Products Corp is Granted. Order and Judgment signed in open court. Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter : Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And [Proposed] Consent Judgment As To Linzer Products Corp.
Off Calendar Sep-15-2015 Continued To Sep-29-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF LAURENCE VINOCUR'S Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And [Proposed] Consent Judgment As To Linzer Products Corp. is continued to September 29, 2015 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302, Law & Motion. The moving party failed to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. The moving party shall immediately provide a courtesy copy of the moving papers and proof of service with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EHG)
